prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, direct/port injection) with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (Garrett GTX3582R turbo, HKS 260° camshafts, HKS titanium valves, HKS high-flow fuel pump, and HKS EVC6 boost controller) targeting 500+ hp on E85 fuel with a custom Link G4+ Xtreme ECU tune

Full drivetrain reinforcement: KAAZ 2.5-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the U660E 6-speed automatic transmission, reinforced driveshafts with JUN Auto carbon-fiber driveshafts, and a Cusco 2-way adjustable rear LSD for improved torque distribution

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Vellfire chassis), Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable), and Cusco rear sway bar (22mm adjustable) paired with Hardrace front and rear camber arms for aggressive alignment settings (-2.5° front, -2.0° rear)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (Vellfire-specific front bumper, rear bumper, and overfenders) with custom carbon-fiber side skirts and a 3M Gloss Black wrap with red pinstriping
Vellfire-specific Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (carbon-fiber front lip, rear diffuser, and GT-style rear wing) with a custom 3D-printed aluminum underbody diffuser for improved downforce

Custom interior with Bride Zeta III reclining bucket seats (Vellfire-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, paired with a full Alcantara headliner and door cards in red stitching
